name: Apricot Bars # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Well beat the eggs with brown sugar, packed.
2. Rinse and chop the apricots. Cover them with water and boil for 10 minutes. Drain and cool.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Grease an 8 x 8 x 2 pan.
5. Mix butter, sugar, and flour until crumbly. Pack into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Sift together 1/3 cup flour, baking powder, and salt.
8. Gradually beat in the remaining brown sugar into the eggs. Add the sifted mixture, mixing well.
9. Mix in vanilla, nuts, and apricots.
10. Spread over the baked layer.
11. Bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until set.
12. Cool in the pan. Cut into bars.
